critical_code_review_comments: All 3 fixes implemented correctly and working as expected
Backend correctly returns payment_day from student.payment_freq (line 1475 in server.py)
Frontend Ödeme Günü column is read-only with amber styling (span.bg-amber-50)
Ödeme Günü filter dynamically populates from unique payment days in data
Ödeme Durumu filter includes 'Boş (Girilmemiş)' option for filtering empty statuses
Temizle button properly clears all active filters
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. Students have payment_freq values like '1', '15'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 fixes from iteration 7 are working correctly: 1) Backend monthly-program-detailed endpoint returns payment_day from student.payment_freq, 2) Frontend Ödeme Günü column is read-only (amber-styled spans showing 'Ayın X. günü'), 3) Ödeme Günü and Ödeme Durumu filters work correctly with Temizle button clearing all filters.

payment_day_from_student_profile.details: GET /api/monthly-program-detailed returns payment_day field from student's payment_freq value

payment_day_column_readonly.details: Ödeme Günü column displays read-only amber-styled spans with 'Ayın X. günü' format, no input fields

payment_status_filter.details: Ödeme Durumu filter with 'Tüm Durumlar', 'Boş (Girilmemiş)', and dynamic status options
